---
title: "PhD model testing AY 2520"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ompr)
library(ompr.roi)
library(ROI.plugin.gurobi)
library(devtools)
library(readxl)
library(digest)
library(purrr)
```

```{r}
# Setting up
load_all()
exists("prepare_phd_model", where = globalenv(), inherits = FALSE)
```


## Loading Data

```{r}
preference <- read_excel("../data/phdModel/AY2520/preference.xlsx", range = "B4:O44")
demand <- read_excel("../data/phdModel/AY2520/demand.xlsx")
past <- read_excel("../data/phdModel/AY2520/pastAssignment.xlsx")
```

```{r}
# helpers

## for course code normalisaton
norm_code <- function(x) {
  toupper(trimws(as.character(x)))
}

## for names
standardise_name <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    as.character() %>%
    str_to_upper() %>%        
    str_replace_all("[^A-Z ]", "") %>% # remove funny letters
    str_squish()             
}
```


## Data cleaning

```{r}
# parameters
Ns <- nrow(preference)
Nj <- nrow(demand)
# courses <- norm_code(pull(demand, course_code))
```

```{r}
# Date handling
reference_date <- ymd("2026-05-01")

preference <- preference %>%
  mutate(intake_month = case_when(
    str_detect(`Year (intake enrolled in)`, "Jan") ~ 1,
    str_detect(`Year (intake enrolled in)`, "Aug") ~ 8,
    TRUE ~ NA),
    intake_year = as.integer(str_extract(`Year (intake enrolled in)`, "\\d{4}")),
    intake_date = ymd(paste(intake_year, intake_month, "01")),
    year_raw = time_length(interval(intake_date, reference_date), "years"),
    seniority = ceiling(year_raw),
    Name = standardise_name(Name)
  ) %>%
  rename(first = 9, second= 10, third = 11) %>%
  arrange(`S/No.`)

# Student-id mapping
student_id <- preference %>%
  select(`S/No.`, Name, seniority) %>%
  rename(ID = `S/No.`)
```

```{r}
# Extracting demand
demand_old <- demand # save a old copy for debugging

demand <- demand %>%
  rename(TA = ta_hours, GR = grading_hours) %>%
  mutate(E = numeric(Nj)) %>%
  arrange(ID)

# calculate the number of Empty units
total_units <- Ns * 4
total_demand <- sum(demand[["TA"]]) + sum(demand[["GR"]])
total_E <- total_units - total_demand

# Allocate E proportionally
eligible <- which(demand$GR > 0)
pick <- eligible[order(demand$GR[eligible], decreasing = TRUE)][seq_len(total_E)]
demand$E[pick] <- 1

# converting to matrix
D <- as.matrix(demand[,c("TA", "GR", "E")])

# building look up course list
courses <- norm_code(pull(demand, course_code))
```
**note that it is very important to ensure P[,j] and D[j,] are referring to the 
same course.**

```{r}
# preference matrix
P <- matrix(-99L, nrow = Ns, ncol = Nj)

for (i in seq_len(Ns)) {

  first  <- norm_code(preference[["first"]][i])
  second <- norm_code(preference[["second"]][i])
  third  <- norm_code(preference[["third"]][i])

  # if first choice is NA, all courses = 3
  if (is.na(first) || first == "") {
    P[i, ] <- 3L
    next
  }

  if (!is.na(first) && first != "") {
    j <- match(first, courses)
    if (!is.na(j)) P[i, j] <- 3L
  }

  if (!is.na(second) && second != "") {
    j <- match(second, courses)
    if (!is.na(j)) P[i, j] <- 2L
  }

  if (!is.na(third) && third != "") {
    j <- match(third, courses)
    if (!is.na(j)) P[i, j] <- 1L
  }
}
```


```{r}
# Extracting previous semester workload
past_clean <- past %>%
  mutate(
    # standardisations
    work_type = str_squish(str_to_lower(work_type)),
    workload  = str_squish(str_to_lower(workload)),
    Name = standardise_name(Name),

    # pull the first number that appears
    n = as.integer(str_extract(workload, "\\d+")),

    unit = case_when(
      str_detect(work_type, "ta") ~ n,
      str_detect(work_type, "grad") ~ n / 11,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    unit_type = case_when(
      str_detect(work_type, "ta") ~ "TA",
      str_detect(work_type, "grad") ~ "GR",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(Name, unit_type) %>%
  summarise(units = sum(unit), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = unit_type, values_from = units, values_fill = 0) %>%
  left_join(student_id %>% select(ID, Name), by = "Name") %>%
  relocate(ID, .before = Name) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ID)) %>%
  arrange(ID)
  
  
# check if every one has exactly 4 units in total. If less than 4, pad with GR.
past_final <- past_clean %>%
  mutate(
    total = TA + GR,
    pad_GR = pmax(0, 4 - total),
    GR = GR + pad_GR
  ) %>%
  select(ID, Name, TA, GR) %>%
  arrange(ID)
```
Note: during actual package implementation, ensure every student exists in past 
table (even if they had no past assignments). remove those not in current 
allocation.

```{r}
# Extracting seniority
s <- pull(preference, seniority) - 2 # offset
```


```{r}
# Input prep
t1 <- pull(past_final, TA)
g1 <- pull(past_final, GR)

# final input to model
df_list = list(
  Ns = Ns, 
  Nj = Nj,
  P  = P,
  d  = D,
  s  = s,
  t1 = t1,
  g1 = g1)
```

## Modelling
```{r}
# initialisation
model_0 <- prepare_phd_model(df_list, e_max = 2)

result_0 <- solve_model(model_0, with_ROI(solver="gurobi"))

alloc_df_0 <- extract_phd_assignment(model_result = result_0, 
                                     student_df = preference)

plot_phd_year_distribution(alloc_df_0, 
                           t1 = df_list$t1, g1 = df_list$g1,
                           facet_by_seniority = TRUE, seniority_col = "seniority")
```


```{r}
get_solution(result_0, Tmax);get_solution(result_0, Tmin)
```

```{r}
# Preference fulfilment
ta_detail <- extract_phd_ta_detail(result_0, preference)
```

## Retrieving top-k result
https://docs.gurobi.com/projects/optimizer/en/current/features/solutionpool.html
```{r}
# build solution pool
result_pool <- solve_model(
  model_0,
  with_ROI(
    solver = "gurobi",
    PoolSearchMode = 2,
    PoolSolutions = 50,
    verbose = TRUE
  )
)
```
```{r}
pool_results <- extract_phd_pool_results(
  result_pool = result_pool,
  preference = preference,
  k = 50
)
```


```{r}
pool_results[[2]]$phd_assignment
```
```{r}
pool_results[[2]]$ta_detail
```

```{r}
# top 3 unique
n_plot <- 3

for (i in seq_len(n_plot)) {
  cur <- pool_results[[i]]

  p <- plot_phd_year_distribution(
    current_alloc_df = cur$phd_assignment,
    t1 = df_list$t1,
    g1 = df_list$g1,
    facet_by_seniority = TRUE,
    seniority_col = "seniority",
    facet_ncol = 4
  ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      subtitle = paste0(
        "rank=", i,
        " | obj=", round(cur$objective_value, 4),
        " | TA min=", round(cur$ta_min, 4),
        " | TA max=", round(cur$ta_max, 4)
      )
    )

  print(p)
}
```


## Comparison with Manual `output_001`

```{r}
demand <- demand_old %>%
  rename(TA = ta_hours, GR = grading_hours) %>%
  mutate(E = numeric(Nj)) %>%
  arrange(ID)

################# HARD CODING CHANGE IN TA HOUR ##############
demand[12, 5] = demand[12, 5] - 8 # ST2334
demand[8,5] = demand[8,5] - 5 # ST1131
############################################################## 

# calculate the number of Empty units
total_units <- Ns * 4
total_demand <- sum(demand[["TA"]]) + sum(demand[["GR"]])
total_E <- total_units - total_demand

# Allocate E in round robin fasion.
eligible <- which(demand$GR > 0)
if (total_E > 0) {
  rr_idx <- eligible[((seq_len(total_E) - 1) %% length(eligible)) + 1]
  demand$E <- tabulate(rr_idx, nbins = nrow(demand))
}


# converting to matrix
D <- as.matrix(demand[,c("TA", "GR", "E")])

# building look up course list
courses <- norm_code(pull(demand, course_code))
```

```{r}
# removing full-time TA's workload
# Input prep
t1 <- pull(past_final, TA)
g1 <- pull(past_final, GR)

# final input to model
df_list_1 = list(
  Ns = Ns, 
  Nj = Nj,
  P  = P,
  d  = D,
  s  = s,
  t1 = t1,
  g1 = g1)
```


```{r}
model_1 <- prepare_phd_model(df_list_1, e_max = 1)

result_1 <- solve_model(model_1, with_ROI(solver="gurobi"))

extracted_1 <- extract_phd_results(result_1, preference)
```

```{r}
plot_phd_year_distribution(extracted_1[[4]], 
                           t1 = df_list$t1, g1 = df_list$g1,
                           facet_by_seniority = TRUE, seniority_col = "seniority")
```



```{r}
manual_output <- read_excel("../data/phdModel/AY2520/output_001.xlsx",
                            sheet = "worker_tbl_2520") %>%
  mutate(name_std = standardise_name(Name))

pref_lookup <- preference %>%
  transmute(
    i = row_number(),
    student_id = `S/No.`,
    student_name = Name,
    name_std = standardise_name(Name)
  )

manual_alloc <- pref_lookup %>%
  left_join(
    manual_output %>%
      select(name_std, tutoring, grading),
    by = "name_std"
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    student_id,
    student_name,
    manual_TA = replace_na(as.numeric(tutoring), 0),
    manual_GR = replace_na(as.numeric(grading), 0),
    manual_E = pmax(0, 4 - manual_TA - manual_GR)
  )

alloc_compare <- extracted_1$phd_assignment %>%
  rename(model_TA = TA, model_GR = GR, model_E = E) %>%
  left_join(manual_alloc, by = c("student_id", "student_name")) %>%
  mutate(
    diff_TA = model_TA - manual_TA,
    diff_GR = model_GR - manual_GR,
    diff_E = model_E - manual_E
  ) %>%
  arrange(student_id)

alloc_compare
```

```{r}
allocation_compare_summary <- alloc_compare %>%
  summarise(
    model_total_TA = sum(model_TA),
    manual_total_TA = sum(manual_TA),
    model_total_GR = sum(model_GR),
    manual_total_GR = sum(manual_GR),
    model_total_E = sum(model_E),
    manual_total_E = sum(manual_E),
    exact_match_count = sum(diff_TA == 0 & diff_GR == 0 & diff_E == 0),
    mae_TA = mean(abs(diff_TA)),
    mae_GR = mean(abs(diff_GR)),
    mae_E = mean(abs(diff_E))
  )

allocation_compare_summary
```

```{r}
# Preference fulfilment comparison (TA-only) between model and manual output
manual_ta_pref_detail <- manual_output %>%
  inner_join(pref_lookup, by = "name_std") %>%
  select(i, student_id, student_name, matches("-t$")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("-t$"),
    names_to = "course_col",
    values_to = "ta_units"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ta_units = replace_na(as.numeric(ta_units), 0),
    course_code = norm_code(str_remove(course_col, "-t$"))
  ) %>%
  filter(ta_units > 1e-8) %>%
  mutate(
    j = match(course_code, courses),
    pref_score = if_else(is.na(j), -99, P[cbind(i, j)]),
    preference_rank = case_when(
      pref_score == 3 ~ "First",
      pref_score == 2 ~ "Second",
      pref_score == 1 ~ "Third",
      TRUE ~ "Unranked"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(student_id, student_name, course_code, ta_units, preference_rank, pref_score) %>%
  arrange(student_id, desc(pref_score), course_code)

model_pref_summary <- extracted_1$ta_detail %>%
  group_by(preference_rank) %>%
  summarise(model_ta_units = sum(units), .groups = "drop")

manual_pref_summary <- manual_ta_pref_detail %>%
  group_by(preference_rank) %>%
  summarise(manual_ta_units = sum(ta_units), .groups = "drop")

pref_compare <- full_join(model_pref_summary, manual_pref_summary, by = "preference_rank") %>%
  mutate(
    model_ta_units = replace_na(model_ta_units, 0),
    manual_ta_units = replace_na(manual_ta_units, 0),
    diff_units = model_ta_units - manual_ta_units
  ) %>%
  arrange(factor(preference_rank, levels = c("First", "Second", "Third", "Unranked")))

pref_compare
```
